overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), starting on a sunlit street with palm trees, moving through covered walkways with neon lighting, under massive overpasses, and across intersections. The scene features high-rise buildings, holographic billboards, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with palm tree planters

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street between tall futuristic buildings with palm tree planters

entered.detail: large concrete planter with palm trees dividing the street
tall futuristic glass and steel skyscraper with reflective windows
large colorful holographic billboard on building facade
futuristic elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit futuristic city street lined with palm trees in concrete planters. Tall glass and steel buildings rise on both sides with an elevated walkway visible overhead. The street is relatively empty with no visible vehicles or pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with large advertising billboard

events.description: moves from open street onto sidewalk next to large billboard
enters shaded area under building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing a large advertisement billboard and benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the camera

entered.detail: large white billboard with blue text advertising Sunday Somewhere
metal benches lined along the left side of the walkway
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the open street to a covered sidewalk area featuring a large 'Sunday Somewhere' billboard. The space becomes more enclosed with metal benches lining the left side and a vending machine visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with neon-lit food stall

events.description: enters deeply covered walkway illuminated by purple neon lights from food stall

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered passage passing a brightly lit food counter with paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the neon-lit food counter
pedestrian walking away from camera down the corridor

entered.detail: food counter with vibrant purple neon lighting and menu displays
traditional round paper lanterns hanging above the food stall
overhead concrete structure covering the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow covered walkway illuminated by vibrant purple neon from a food stall on the left. Paper lanterns hang above the counter, and the enclosed space creates an intimate market atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza under massive highway overpass

events.description: exits narrow covered walkway into open plaza area under elevated highway
camera tilts upward to look at the overpass structure above

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and looking up at the massive concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving on the street to the left

entered.detail: large political billboard with 'VOTE' text and candidate image
multi-level concrete highway overpass with support pillars
tall building with distinctive red curved facade and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a spacious urban plaza dominated by a massive concrete overpass structure. A large 'VOTE' billboard is visible on a building ahead, and the camera pans upward to admire the architectural complexity of the elevated highway.

events.description: begins crossing the street at the crosswalk
silver sports car drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with a group of other pedestrians while watching for traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
traffic signal pole with walk/don't walk indicators
corner building with green facade and 'Security Services' neon sign

segments.scene_description: Crossing a sunlit intersection at the crosswalk, accompanied by other pedestrians. A sleek silver sports car drives past on the left, and a building with 'Security Services' signage becomes prominent on the right corner.

events.description: finishes crossing and continues along the opposite sidewalk
passes food cart with steam rising from the ground nearby

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and a street food vendor

notable_agents.action: shirtless man in red pants standing on the corner
woman with red and white umbrella walking ahead

entered.detail: street food cart with red and white striped umbrella
steam rising from a vent in the pavement

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past a shirtless man standing on the corner and approaching a food cart with a red and white umbrella. Steam rises from a vent in the pavement, and the walkway is lined with industrial pillars and storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open futuristic boulevard into the enclosed neon depths of a city market before emerging back into a sprawling urban intersection. It begins on a sunlit street lined with palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers, moving steadily forward until the open air gives way to a covered sidewalk featuring a large Sunday Somewhere billboard and metal benches. The environment then tightens into a narrow, intimate walkway bathed in vibrant purple neon and decorated with hanging paper lanterns from a food stall. As the camera exits this enclosed space, the scene expands into a massive plaza dominated by a concrete overpass and a prominent VOTE billboard, before panning upward to capture the architectural scale of the highway. Finally, the movement flows across a sunlit intersection past a sleek silver sports car and a security services building, continuing along a sidewalk where steam rises from pavement vents near a red and white food cart umbrella.
